videos.title: How to beat Esper Pixie  Mono White Control in Standard
videos.description:
This mono white tokens control deck features Serra Paragon to help solve various matchups in the current Standard MTG Arena BO1 meta.

Decklist - https://moxfield.com/decks/3Je9gnGdGkmDL1XsmhGFzQ
